tasks.subject: P10 Task 0: In-house Bessel Jm module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Validated bessel::bessel_jn(m,x) for real x, both branches (|x|<8 polynomial, |x|>=8 asymptotic), no external dependency. Files: create antenna-model/src/model/bessel.rs; modify model/mod.rs. Verify: cargo test -p antenna-model --lib bessel.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/bessel.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/mod.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model --lib bessel -- --nocapture", "acceptanceCriteria": ["bessel_j0/j1/jn implemented", "both branches cross-checked against known values", "Miller downward recurrence for n>=2", "clippy -D warnings clean"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: P10 Task 1: Symmetric Hankel radial integrator (m=0)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace inner 2D quadrature of integrate_aperture with 1D J0 Hankel transform for symmetric apertures; signature unchanged. Verify: cargo test -p antenna-model --lib integration && pattern.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/integration.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model --lib integration && cargo test -p antenna-model --lib pattern", "acceptanceCriteria": ["hankel_radial_field implemented", "symmetric case routed, signature unchanged", "matches 2D <0.05 dB near-in", "θ=90° physical ~-33.3 not aliased", "existing tests pass"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: P10 Task 2: Azimuthal-mode (Jm) expansion for coma/asymmetric apertures
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Generalize to laterally-displaced feeds via Jm azimuthal-mode expansion (includes higher-order Seidel, D-5). Verify: cargo test -p antenna-model --lib integration && pattern && edge_cases.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/integration.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model --lib integration && cargo test -p antenna-model --lib pattern && cargo test -p antenna-model --lib edge_cases", "acceptanceCriteria": ["azimuthal_mode_field with ±m coefficients", "asymmetric routed, symmetric untouched", "small-dish offset matches 2D <0.1 dB + coma asymmetry", "dsn_34m offset physical off-axis", "existing coma tests pass"], "modelTier": "high"}
```

tasks.subject: P10 Task 3: Adaptive N_rho + mode-count + convergence self-check (D-6)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** N_rho from (D/λ,θ) at ~2× Nyquist + N-vs-2N / M-vs-M+1 self-check that flags non-convergence, never silent. Verify: cargo test -p antenna-model --lib integration.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/integration.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model --lib integration -- --nocapture", "acceptanceCriteria": ["radial_points_for ~4·(D/λ)·sinθ floored/capped", "self-check flags non-convergence, never silent", "θ=0 cheap floor", "gbt_100m q-band θ=90° converged O(10^4) points"], "modelTier": "high"}
```

tasks.subject: P10 Task 4: Off-axis validation protocol (REQUIRED — user gate)
tasks.description:
**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Required validation protocol; do not shortcut. Cross-check production integrator vs converged 2D over angle × D/λ × band grid, both Bessel branches, symmetric + offset-feed antennas. Verify: cargo test -p antenna-model --test reference_validation.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/tests/reference_validation.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model --test reference_validation -- --nocapture", "acceptanceCriteria": ["2D agreement <0.1 dB near-in on 3.7 m AND 100 m, both branches", "θ=90° physical for every enabled antenna", "repeated across bands S→Ka/Q", "offset-feed coma covered + M-vs-M+1 <0.1 dB", "dsn_34m x-band anchors 68.96/14.53/-33.3", "brute-force oracle retained #[ignore]d"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "all-enabled-antennas", "requireEvidenceTokens": [["symmetric", "3.7m", "small"], ["large", "100m", "dsn_34m"], ["coma", "offset", "asymmetric"]], "modelTier": "high"}
```

tasks.subject: P10 Task 5: Single adaptive service path; retire presets; route higher-order (D-4,D-5)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Service calls one adaptive integrator everywhere; retire fast()/high_accuracy() split; higher-order uses mode integrator; flag (not fix) ray-tracing. Verify: cargo test --workspace && clippy.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/model/integration.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/pattern.rs", "antenna-model/src/service/evaluator.rs", "antenna-model/src/service/h3_link_budget.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test --workspace && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings", "acceptanceCriteria": ["service uses IntegrationParams::adaptive()", "presets removed or demoted", "higher-order routes through mode integrator", "ray-tracing warning retained", "evaluator-vs-harness same-path <1e-9", "workspace green + clippy clean"], "modelTier": "high"}
```

tasks.subject: P10 Task 6: Off-axis warning numerical→physical; bump version; docs truth
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rework D-3 warning from numerical-invalidity to physical-incompleteness; bump PHYSICS_MODEL_VERSION; docs truth (P10 done, F7 unblocked pending D-2). Verify: cargo test --workspace.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/service/evaluator.rs", "antenna-model/src/model/mod.rs", "docs/domain-contract.md", "docs/api-documentation.md", "docs/roadmap-2026-07.md", "docs/roadmap-2026-07-work-units.md"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model --lib off_axis && cargo test -p antenna-model --test '*' off_axis && cargo test --workspace", "acceptanceCriteria": ["warning reworded numerical→physical, dedup-constant", "evaluator test asserts new wording", "PHYSICS_MODEL_VERSION bumped, mismatch test passes", "domain-contract off-axis resolved, F7 unblocked", "api-documentation caveat rewritten", "roadmap P10→Done, F7→Unblocked"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
